name: foia_request
description: a FOIA request-processing world with exemptions; actions submit, review, release, redact

card.description: a FOIA request-processing world with exemptions; actions submit, review, release, redact

rules: A request must be submitted before it can be reviewed.
Review examines responsive records and flags any exempt material, citing the FOIA exemption(s) invoked (e.g. b6 personal privacy, b5 deliberative).
Every responsive record must be reviewed before the request can be released.
Exempt pages must be redacted before the records that contain them are released.
Release is blocked until all exempt pages have been redacted.
The disposition is 'released_in_full' when nothing was redacted, 'denied' when every page was withheld, otherwise 'partially_released'.
Each action advances the processing clock by one day and may accrue fees; completed dispositions are terminal.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name")
    params = action.get("params") or {}

    status = s.get("status", "draft")
    responsive = int(s.get("responsive_records", 0))
    reviewed = int(s.get("reviewed_records", 0))
    exempt_records = int(s.get("exempt_records", 0))
    exemptions = list(s.get("exemptions", []))
    pages_total = int(s.get("pages_total", 0))
    exempt_pages = int(s.get("exempt_pages", 0))
    pages_redacted = int(s.get("pages_redacted", 0))
    pages_released = int(s.get("pages_released", 0))
    redactions = int(s.get("redactions_applied", 0))
    released = bool(s.get("released", False))
    fee = int(s.get("fee", 0))
    day = int(s.get("day", 0))

    # pages held per responsive record (used to size review/redaction batches)
    ppr = (pages_total // responsive) if responsive > 0 else 0

    if name == "submit":
        # Only a fresh draft can be submitted; resubmits are no-ops.
        if status == "draft":
            text = params.get("text") or s.get("request_text") or "Records request"
            recs = int(params.get("records", responsive if responsive > 0 else 6))
            pages = int(params.get("pages", pages_total if pages_total > 0 else 30))
            s["request_text"] = str(text)
            s["responsive_records"] = max(recs, 0)
            s["pages_total"] = max(pages, 0)
            s["status"] = "submitted"
            s["day"] = day + 1
        return s

    if name == "review":
        # Examine responsive records in batches, flagging exempt material.
        if status in ("submitted", "under_review") and reviewed < responsive:
            batch = int(params.get("count", 1))
            if batch < 1:
                batch = 1
            n = min(batch, responsive - reviewed)
            new_exempt_pages = 0
            for i in range(n):
                idx = reviewed + i + 1          # 1-based record index
                if idx % 2 == 0:               # every other record holds exempt material
                    exempt_records += 1
                    new_exempt_pages += ppr
            reviewed += n
            exempt_pages += new_exempt_pages
            # Cite the exemptions invoked as exempt material is found.
            if exempt_records > 0 and "b6" not in exemptions:   # personal privacy
                exemptions.append("b6")
            if exempt_records > 2 and "b5" not in exemptions:   # deliberative process
                exemptions.append("b5")
            fee += n * 5                       # search fee, $5 per record
            s["reviewed_records"] = reviewed
            s["exempt_records"] = exempt_records
            s["exempt_pages"] = exempt_pages
            s["exemptions"] = exemptions
            s["fee"] = fee
            s["day"] = day + 1
            s["status"] = "reviewed" if reviewed >= responsive else "under_review"
        return s

    if name == "redact":
        # Black out exempt pages; release is blocked until none remain.
        if status in ("reviewed", "redacting") and pages_redacted < exempt_pages:
            batch = int(params.get("pages", ppr if ppr > 0 else 1))
            if batch < 1:
                batch = 1
            n = min(batch, exempt_pages - pages_redacted)
            pages_redacted += n
            redactions += 1
            fee += n                           # duplication cost, $1 per page
            s["pages_redacted"] = pages_redacted
            s["redactions_applied"] = redactions
            s["fee"] = fee
            s["day"] = day + 1
            s["status"] = "reviewed" if pages_redacted >= exempt_pages else "redacting"
        return s

    if name == "release":
        # Disposition is only lawful once review is complete and all exempt
        # pages are redacted.
        if (status in ("reviewed", "redacting")
                and responsive > 0 and reviewed >= responsive
                and pages_redacted >= exempt_pages
                and not released):
            pages_released = max(pages_total - pages_redacted, 0)
            s["pages_released"] = pages_released
            s["released"] = True
            if pages_redacted == 0:
                s["status"] = "released_in_full"
            elif pages_released == 0:
                s["status"] = "denied"
            else:
                s["status"] = "partially_released"
            s["day"] = day + 1
        return s

    return s

emit.report: FOIA response — disposition: {status}. {pages_released} of {pages_total} pages released, {pages_redacted} redacted under exemptions {exemptions} ({redactions_applied} redaction passes). Processing fee: ${fee}.
